values.description: Your app URL (or ngrok URL if testing webhooks)
Copy from your .env SHOPIFY_API_SECRET — used to sign fake webhook payloads
A real shipping handle from your dev store. Get it: Storefront API → cart → availableShippingRates
A real product variant GID from your dev store. e.g. gid://shopify/ProductVariant/12345
Subtotal in BDT for test orders. Must match the actual line item price.
A real active discount code in your dev store (create one in Shopify Admin → Discounts)
Auto-set by test 2.1 (extracted from bKash redirectUrl)
Manually set — initiate a second payment with a different cartId, copy its bkash paymentID here
Manually set AFTER completing a full bKash sandbox payment. Copy the payment_id from test 2.1.
The Shopify order GID of a completed order. Get it from DB: SELECT shopify_order_id FROM orders LIMIT 1
Auto-set by test 4.2 after a COMPLETED payment status poll
